title: 3 Pack Replacement Rubber Ball Valve Washers,Replacement Diaphragm Washers Compatible with Siamp Inlet Valves,Including Models 95, 95L, 99T, 99B, and 99
seller_info_text: guang zhou tao lu shen mao yi you xian gong si
features: Premium rubber replacement seal designed specifically for Siamp valves.
Easy to identify and install:ensuring a perfect fit and reliable performance.
Durable Rubber Material: Made of durable rubber, these diaphragm gaskets prioritize longevity and reliability.
Package contains: This comprehensive kit includes 3 rubber diaphragm washers. It provides a universal alternative solution that ensures compatibility and convenience for a wide range of applications.
High-quality service: If you have any questions, please contact us in time and we will answer them for you.
description: Cistern Valve Inlet Fill Valve Diaphragm washer. Fits for all Siamp ball valves without hassle. Suitable for both bottom and side inlet filling valves. 28mm overall diameter with a 15mm depth for optimal sealing. Easily recognizable design simplifies installation and maintenance.
